name: sentio-module-federation
description: Module Federation example with Search App and Shell App

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --workspace=search-app && npm install --workspace=shell-app && npm install --workspace=library-app && npm install --workspace=player-app
scripts.install-ci: npm ci && npm ci --workspace=search-app && npm ci --workspace=shell-app && npm ci --workspace=library-app && npm ci --workspace=player-app
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run search-app:start" "npm run shell-app:start" "npm run library-app:start" "npm run player-app:start"
scripts.stop: pkill -f "webpack serve" || true && echo "All apps stopped"
